title: sphaeralcea coccinea
intro: Sphaeralcea coccinea, also known as the scarlet globe mallow, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the mallow family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The herbal preparations of Sphaeralcea coccinea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a convenient and accessible way to harness its medicinal properties.
